tools.name: users.osloginUsersGetLoginProfile
tools.description: Retrieves the profile information used for logging in to a virtual machine on Google Compute Engine.

tools.name: users.osloginUsersImportSshPublicKey
tools.description: Adds an SSH public key and returns the profile information. Default POSIX account information is set when no username and UID exist as part of the login profile.

tools.name: users.osloginUsersSshPublicKeysPatch
tools.description: Updates an SSH public key and returns the profile information. This method supports patch semantics.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
